Marietta, GA is served by 348 law practices in our directory, 238 firms and 110 solo attorneys. Browse them by practice area, rating, or distance. Jones & Swanson is among the top rated. Frequently asked questions

How many lawyers are in Marietta, GA?

Our directory lists 348 lawyers and law firms in Marietta, Georgia, 238 law firms and 110 solo attorneys, all in Cobb County.

Who is a top rated lawyer in Marietta?

Jones & Swanson is one of the highest rated personal injury lawyers in Marietta, with 5.0 stars across 569 reviews.

What types of lawyers practice in Marietta?

Marietta has 131 general practice lawyers, 69 personal injury lawyers, 49 divorce & family lawyers, 54 criminal defense lawyers, 16 real estate lawyers, 11 bankruptcy lawyers.

Do Marietta lawyers offer free consultations?

Many do. Use the Call or Website button on any listing to ask about a free consultation, fees, and availability before you hire.
